Experience the ultimate freedom with USPA-certified instructors. The sky is not the limit—it's just the beginning.

CHOOSE YOUR FLIGHT

From first steps to pro jumps, we have the altitude for you.

Most Popular

Tandem Jump

$249 / person

For your first time. Attached to an instructor.

  • 15 min Briefing
  • 60s Freefall
  • Video Option Available
  • Certificate of Completion

Solo Licensure

$189 / person

For licensed skydivers (USPA A-License required).

  • Gear Rental Included
  • Packing Mat Available
  • Brief & Debrief
  • Logbook Signature

Sunset Gold

$299 / person

The ultimate golden hour experience.

  • Premium Time Slot
  • Extra Altitude (15k ft)
  • Free High-Res Photos
  • Champagne Toast

Weekend Warrior

$799 / person

Full weekend immersion package.

  • 4 Jumps Included
  • Accommodation for 2 Nights
  • Dinner with Crew
  • Exclusive Merch

Gear & Tech

We use only the latest Sigma Tandem Systems and Cypres 2 AADs (Automatic Activation Devices). Every rig is inspected every 180 days by FAA-certified riggers.

Sigma Tandem System

The industry standard for safety and comfort. Rated for 5000lbs.

Cypres 2 AAD

Computer-controlled backup that automatically deploys the reserve if needed.

PAC 750 XL

Turbine aircraft specifically designed for skydiving operations, maintained to Part 135 standards.

CAPTURED MOMENTS

SECURE YOUR DROP

Real-time availability. Instant confirmation. No hidden fees.

LIVE CONDITIONS

Dropzone: Skydive Apex

Wind
5 kts (Good)
Ceiling
12,000 ft
Temp
72°F
STATUS: GREEN - GO FOR JUMP

Pricing Transparency

• Prices include gear rental & instructor fee.

• USPA Membership required for Solo Jumps.

• Full refund if weather prevents jump.

February 23rd, 2026

Handcam Video

Jump Insurance

You won't be charged until jump day.

FIRST-TIMER ANXIETY?

PRE-FLIGHT CHECK

Medical Requirements

  • Must be in generally good health
  • No scuba diving within 24 hours
  • Not under influence of alcohol/drugs
  • Max weight: 230lbs (Call if over)

What to Bring

  • Valid Government ID (Drivers License/Passport)
  • Sneakers/Laced shoes (No sandals/boots)
  • Comfortable, athletic clothing

Cancellation Policy

Full refund for weather-related cancellations. 48-hour notice required for customer-initiated rescheduling.

APEX DROP

Safety First, Adrenaline Second. experience the ultimate thrill with certified professionals.
